title: Make adopter installation and upgrade workflow require explicit human gates

intent.problem: The adopter installation and upgrade guidance does not consistently require human authorization before commit, push, PR merge, or branch cleanup. That ambiguity can cause an adopter project to bypass review or delete the Work Item branch before lifecycle closure.
constraints: Do not change the template repository's own maintenance lifecycle.
Do not let the installer commit, push, merge, or delete branches in the adopter repository.
Keep installation and upgrade sources pinned to published release tags and preserve historical Work Item evidence.
intent.rationale: Make external state changes explicit human approval points while retaining automated local validation and fail-closed closure checks.

outOfScope: Changing the template repository's own PR, merge, or closure protocol.
Automatically committing, pushing, merging, or deleting adopter-project branches.
Adding a hosted-platform-specific auto-merge or post-merge cleanup integration.
Changing product-code behavior in an adopter project.

sources.reason: Defines the adopter installation and calibration workflow.
Defines repository-role-aware branch, PR, and closure rules.
Defines the current upgrade entry point.
Generates the adopter bootstrap Contract/Summary and installer next steps.
Covers the first-adoption installer and Work Item path.
Confirmed that commit, push, merge, and cleanup need separate human gates in adopter projects.

problemStatement: Adopter installation and upgrade must stop at each externally mutating step until a human explicitly authorizes it, while template maintenance remains unchanged.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Adopter installation stops before commit, push, merge, and cleanup
scenarioCoverage.reason: Update installer output and documentation, then verify with tests.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Adopter upgrade uses a separate Work Item and pinned release tag
scenarioCoverage.reason: Add the explicit upgrade lifecycle guidance and evidence fields.
Run existing lifecycle and documentation regression checks.

riskAssessment.reason: The installer is shared source code, so adopter-only behavior must not alter template-maintenance semantics.

executionDecision.reason: The user approved the conservative adopter-project workflow and the boundary is testable locally.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm adopter-only manual gates and unchanged template-maintenance workflow.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Adopter installation and upgrade documentation requires explicit human approval before commit, push, PR merge, and branch cleanup.
The installer emits adopter evidence for base remote/branch/commit and pinned release source without performing commit, push, merge, or branch deletion.
The template repository's maintenance workflow remains unchanged and is covered by regression tests.
Documentation metadata and adoption end-to-end checks pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly approved the conservative adopter installation and upgrade workflow.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
